title: Email
description: A single test email retrieved from a Testmail programmable inbox.

to.description: Recipient email address in the testmail namespace (namespace.tag@inbox.testmail.app).

tag.description: Tag portion of the recipient address used to route the email to this inbox.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the email was received by Testmail.

headers.description: Raw email headers. Only present when requested via headers=true (JSON API) or selected in GraphQL.

from_parsed.description: Parsed sender address components. Available in GraphQL API only.

spam_score.description: SpamAssassin spam score. Scores above 5 are typically flagged as spam. Only present when spam_report=true.

spam_report.description: Detailed SpamAssassin spam analysis report. Only present when spam_report=true (JSON API).

EmailHeader.title: EmailHeader
EmailHeader.description: A single raw email header line.

line.description: Full raw header line including name and value.

ParsedAddress.title: ParsedAddress
ParsedAddress.description: Parsed email address with display name and raw address separated.

name.description: Display name associated with the address.
